TestCase z66Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_p2 = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_p2, t1.p2, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.p2 = follow_case_p2;
    // ------------------------------------

    // Defensive code: ensure there is at least one element to process
    if (follow_case.n > 0) {
        // Compute Euclidean norm of the array
        double sum_sq = 0.0;
        for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; ++i) {
            sum_sq += follow_case.p2[i] * follow_case.p2[i];
        }
        double norm = sqrt(sum_sq);
        // Avoid division by zero
        if (norm != 0.0) {
            for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; ++i) {
                follow_case.p2[i] /= norm;
            }
        }
    }

    return follow_case;
}
